creator: atukrhubdotnet"@chaos.ukrhub.net
text:
Russian translation of doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/custom-gcc is
available ouside the FDP. Please, insert it into the Documentation
Project.

Fix: 

Fetch http://chaos.ukrhub.net/custom-gcc/doc.ru.articles.custom-gcc.tbz ,
unpack,
place unpacked to the proper directories,
patch doc/ru_RU.KOI8-R/articles/Makefile with Makefile.diff
How-To-Repeat: Just check the repository.
